language_prompt_title: Vyber jazyk programu / Choose language / Sprache wählen
no_internet_using_local: No internet connection available. Continuing with the locally stored copy.
no_internet_no_local: No internet connection is available and there is no local copy of the project yet. Please connect to the internet and run the program again.
checking_update: Checking whether a newer version of the original project is available on GitHub...
update_available: A newer version of the original project is available (commit from {date}). You currently have the version from {local_date}.
update_prompt: Do you want to download it and replace the existing copy? [y/n]:
update_downloading: Downloading the latest version from GitHub...
update_skipped: Update skipped, continuing with the existing local copy.
no_local_copy_downloading: No local copy yet. Downloading it for the first time from GitHub...
up_to_date: You have the latest version of the original project.
preparing_working_copy: Preparing working copy of the project...
board_selection_question: Are you using a Wemos D1 Mini ESP32 board? (If unsure, choose 'no' - that is the setting for a standard ESP32 Dev board.) [y/n]:
vehicle_selection_prompt: Enter the number of the vehicle you want to configure:
param_edit_prompt: Enter the number of the parameter to edit (or 0 to continue):
param_toggle_prompt: Toggle '{label}' from {value} to the opposite value? [y/n]:
sound_choice_prompt: Choose the number of the sound to use for '{label}':
writing_changes: Writing changes to the working project...
upload_prompt: Do you want to upload the firmware to the board now via 'pio run --target upload'? The board must be connected via USB. [y/n]:
upload_failed: Upload failed. Please check the board connection and the output below:
upload_skipped: Upload skipped. You can find the working project here: {path}
board_master_settings_missing: Could not find the board settings file (0_generalSettings.h) in the downloaded project.
vehicle_file_missing: Could not find 1_Vehicle.h in the downloaded project.
param_type_sound_choice: choice of one sound from a list
param_type_choice: choose one option from the list
app_subtitle: Configure your sound module without editing any code by hand
app_credit_label: Built on top of the project
